name: Network Services Group
notes:
Network Services Group (NSG) is a cutting edge company that specializes in IT Support, Managed Services, and Cloud Integration for small to medium sized businesses in the Great Lakes Bay Region area that typically do not employ in-house IT staff. We have been in business since 1988, when we started life as Specialized Bulletin Board Systems (sbbsnet.net). As the internet and business needs evolved, we grew with the industry into the successful NSP and MSP we are today.

For further details about our company and services, please see our web site at https://www.netservicesgroup.com .

Peering-related correspondence should be directed to peering@netservicesgroup.com.
